--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Centaur — Armored Escapist (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Centaur — Armored Escapist
→ Bite: [d20:13+10=23 vs AC 20] HIT! 17 damage. Centaur — Armored Escapist HP: 42/59
→ Bite: [d20:11+10=21 vs AC 20] HIT! 12 damage. Centaur — Armored Escapist HP: 30/59
→ Bite: [d20:18+10=28 vs AC 20] HIT! 19 damage. Centaur — Armored Escapist HP: 11/59
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Centaur — Armored Escapist --- HP: 11/59 | AC: 20
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (11/59). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Centaur — Armored Escapist is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Centaur — Armored Escapist (3 attacks).
